title: Heritage Italian Leather Weekender Bag
seoTitle: Heritage Italian Leather Weekender Bag — Premium Full-Grain Travel Bag
metaDescription: Carry timeless style with the Heritage Italian Leather Weekender Bag. Full-grain leather, brass hardware, and hand-stitched finishes—designed for effortless travel.
shortDescription: A handcrafted full-grain Italian leather weekender with brass hardware, padded interior, and smart organization—luxury travel, simplified.
longDescription:
Discover the Heritage Italian Leather Weekender Bag: where classic craftsmanship meets modern travel needs. Handcrafted from sustainably sourced full-grain Italian leather, this weekender develops a rich patina with every journey. Solid brass hardware and reinforced hand-stitching ensure long-lasting durability, while a soft, cotton-lined interior with zip and slip pockets keeps essentials organized and protected. The removable shoulder strap features a leather pad for comfort, and the exterior includes a discreet luggage pass-through for seamless airport transit. Ideal for weekend getaways, business trips, or as an elegant carry-on, this bag blends timeless design with practical details for the discerning traveler.

Key benefits:
- Premium materials that age beautifully
- Thoughtful organization for efficient packing
- Durable construction built to last a lifetime
- Versatile styling that pairs with casual and formal looks

Each bag is individually inspected and packaged in a reusable dust bag, making it a perfect gift or a sustainable addition to your travel essentials.

features.name: Material
features.value: Full-grain Italian leather — vegetable-tanned, responsibly sourced

features.name: Hardware
features.value: Solid brass zippers, buckles, and protective studs

features.name: Dimensions
features.value: 21" L x 11" H x 9" W (fits most airline carry-on requirements)

features.name: Interior
features.value: Cotton-lined with zip pocket, two slip pockets, and padded laptop sleeve (up to 15")

features.name: Strap
features.value: Removable, adjustable leather shoulder strap with comfort pad

features.name: Construction
features.value: Hand-stitched seams with reinforced stress points for longevity

features.name: Finish
features.value: Natural leather with rich patina that develops over time

features.name: Care
features.value: Comes with leather care cloth and recommended conditioner instructions

features.name: Packaging
features.value: Reusabledust bag and recyclable gift box
